feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content:
Is it possible to deploy SAPUI5 app to s4hana cloud system.

I only found ways of deploy to Cloud Foundry and ABAP repository (on-premise) system.

If possible, could you please provide me step by step documentation.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Add BP Role UKM000 in Customer Migration Template
entry.content: How to add BP Role UKM000 while migrating Customer Master through template?

entry.title: SAP TRM: Separation of loan principal and interest payments
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we are currently facing the following challenge in our public cloud system. 

Problem:
Currently, SAP TRM can only post to one account. When the account "Liabilities to Affiliated Companies" is used for payments, the interest income is also posted to this account instead of to "Receivables from Affiliated Companies." It is not possible to differentiate between payment liabilities (loans) and receivables (interest).

Current Workaround:
Manual rebooking of liabilities to receivables.

Desired Solution:

  1. Enable differentiation between loan principal and interest payments.
  2. Post the loan principal to the account "Liabilities to Affiliated Companies."
  3. Post interest payments to "Receivables from Affiliated Companies."

This would eliminate the need for manual rebooking.

Process description:
First, we create a loan using the transaction "Create IR Instrument (TM_51)" with the Product Type "55I-Interest Rate Instrument - INT" and the Transaction Type "100-Invest." The Flow Type "1100-Principal Increase" and Condition Type "1200-Nominal Interest" are selected under the Interest Structure. The Condition Type "1120-Final Repayment" is used under the Repayment Structure.

In the next step, we use the transaction "Fix, Pay and Post Flows - TBB1" to post the loan.

Questions:

Is there any way we can get the desired result, which is a separation between the loan principal posting and the interest payments, without additional manual postings? Can we trigger two separate postings from TBB1? Is there any customizing that would allow us to do this?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Tobias

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Einvoicing for India
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Electronic Customer Invoices for India. Can someone please explain what is the exact difference between the Einvoice for Customers Legacy (SAP Cloud Integration or SAP Integration Suite ) and the new Einvoicing for customers (SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition). We need to understand if there is any difference besides the way to push to Tax authority/Government

Please find the Sap help portal links below;

Einvoice for Customers Legacy

Electronic Invoices (Legacy) | SAP Help Portal

Electronic Customer Invoice

Electronic Customer Invoices | SAP Help Portal

Thanks

entry.title: API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV returns no header pricing data
entry.content:
We are seeing no header pricing data coming back from this service and wonder if it is a bug that SAP should investigate or fix.

Even in the tryout feature, no billing documents return header pricing.

https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/tryout

Has anyone been able to retrieve header pricing conditions for billing documents with this service?

entry.title: How can I configure Communication arrangement setup for custom theme in CIM interface?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on CIM implementation from SAP S4 public cloud. We are currently stuck at custom theme in CIM interface as its client requirement. We have already setup custom theme in S4 hana public cloud but when we try to open CIM interface from public cloud, CIM interface does not open in custom theme or any default theme.

How to rectify this issue? Do we have to setup communication arrangement in CIM interface as well, if so We don't have that feature in CIM. Please suggest us how we should access CIM through public cloud without facing theme issue.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management   SAP Ariba solution integration for SAP Business Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: RF Devices connection with SAP Public Cloud WM
entry.content:
Hello,

We are starting a greenfield implementation for a client for SAP Public Cloud. For Cloud WM, I need to integrate the RF Scanner with our Public Cloud system. Mostly only standard functionality will be used for RF process. Can you suggest the steps for connection. I know there is a GSI 3W0, but can anyone simplify the process about APIs and all to achieve a smooth process.

RISE with SAP SAP Community SAP Fiori SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Simulation cannot be created: Could not add BOM component to configuration session
entry.content:
Hello!

We are in S4 Public Cloud and I am trying to simulate variant configuration model. We are using Order BOM as process and here is how the config profile looks like:

Now I am trying to simulate by entering the following parameters:

And when I hit OK I get the following error message: "Could not add BOM component xxxxxx to configuration session".

Note that - there are two components in the BOM and the error is generated for one component. The other is working fine as I have tested that in the sales order variant config screen:

Any idea what may cause this issue? I have tried this in our starter system and it works fine - we are facing this error in the customizing system.

  Any input would be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS Development - Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are implementing SAP Public Cloud and have some requirements that has to be addressed by custom development. There are few questions in using CDS Views in SAP Public Cloud Only and use the view in SAC Live and Data Acquisition models?

1. Can I use Eclipse IDE for creating CDS views? SAP Note: 3016104 suggests it cannot be used?

2. Is it necessary to have COMPOSITE and CONSUMPTION views and associated annotations like @analytics.category: #CUBE and @analytics.query: TRUE - Any restrictions?

2. Once the CDS is created using Eclipse, what is the Binding Type to be used? InA-UI, OData V2 Web API?

3. Are there any step by step process?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: 物料计划价格
entry.content: hello工程师，想问下如果在不使用数据迁移的前提下，物料的计划价格还有其他方法可以实现批量导入、修改和删除吗？

entry.title: Format for India Withholding Reports
entry.content:
Hi,

We are working on SAP Public Cloud and one of my Indian client want to do TDS/TCS return quarterly basis via FVU file. SAP provides a file .TXT format.

If anyone has worked on such requirement pls enlighten me how we need to approach and what we need to do.

Thanks

entry.title: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
I want to use a web link/ URL  (example link : https://www.sap.com) inside ABAP class in eclipse .But facing issues like call methods, cl_gui_frontend_services  and other function modules are not permitted. Calling Web URL directly into ABAP  class is possible? or any alternative methods are there ? pls provide a solution to this.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment  BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) 

#ECLIPSE

entry.title: Request additional Special G/l indicator in SAP s/4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We already knew that there is no way to config additional special g/l indicators in SAP S/4hana cloud, public edition. But we just wanted to know if there will be costs or fees if we directly request to SAP  additional spcl g/l indicators necessary for the client's business? 

Thank You

Regards, 

Melle 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: standard list of scope items for the MM
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please let me know where I can find a standard list of scope items for the MM module, including various types of procurement documents and material type management? I am new to the MM module and am unsure where to start my studies. I have already reviewed scope items J45, 1XF, BNX, BMD, and BMK. Are there any other essential basics that I might have missed?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Bank Integration for Incoming receipts (2YM) - Payment Message Handling
entry.content:
How to process the incoming files from the Bank in the application scope 2YM (Application Interface to Retrieve Payment Files).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HU selection in outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need your assistance with an issue related to the selection of handling units in outbound delivery.

The context is as follows:

Our customer's packaging operations take place at a completely different time from the shipping process. As a result, handling units are created well in advance of shipping, and even well in advance of all sales orders. The HUs will be associated with the item when the picking task is processed.

This management approach requires us to ensure that the operator can manually select the "Source handling unit" during the picking task. However, in the current system, it is not possible to manually define the "Source handling unit."

The objective is twofold: first, the system must be able, based on the handling units created in advance, to automatically suggest a unit for an item during the picking task. Secondly, the operator should be able to manually select a unit to assign to the product if the suggested unit does not meet the specified requirement.

Do you have any ideas on how to deal with this ?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Consolidation process
entry.content: How to define Consolidation unit types? percentages were set on Company level but we don't see the effect of this during our consolidation process on S4Hana public cloud 2408

entry.title: Update language of sales order item description and billing document item description
entry.content:
Dear community,

System: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2408

I have created a sales document, e.g. a sales order for a customer. In the business partner the country and standard communication language are set to DE for German language.

The text for the item description (from material master) in the sales order will now appear in DE language on all sales documents including billing documents. Even if I change language in the output items to EN the item description will always be displayed in the language of the customer, the rest of the form will change to EN.

Now I change the country and language of the customer e.g. to US and EN. All new sales documents and billing documents will be printed with EN item description taken from material master.

BUT: The old sales documents will still be printed with DE item description, the same is valid for new billing documents created from old sales documents after the change language in customer master. 

How can I change this behavior? There is an option for price updates, how can I mass update the item description in existing sales documents and downstream documents?

The system must always use the latest language entry from the business partner to determine the item language for description from material master.

Thank you.

BR

Dirk

entry.title: 403 Forbidden Error when trying to access to the tile on my QA environment - SAP Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi, basically I built an app using the ABAP2UI5 Repository, we are working on HANA Public Cloud environment and everything went OK in DEV tenant, we ran it and I created a custom tile to execute the HTTP Service. After some tests we moved everything to Test Tenant, transports and software collection import went OK, but when we tried to execute our custom tile in Test, it throws a 403 Forbidden error, also we tried with the Http handler URL and the DEV URL (changin tenant ID), but the same error shows up.

Had someone a similar problem when tried to move their APP to another tenant? We created an App sent by SAP, so it is supposed to run in PRD tenant. Have we forgot something in the process after transport? maybe somo authorizations.
